headline: General Motors (GM) Reports Strong Q1 Results, Gets Price Target Boosted to $126
summary: With an upside potential of 28.02% as of May 3, General Motors Company (NYSE:GM) is included among the 10 Best Fortune 500 Stocks to Buy According to Analysts. General Motors Company (NYSE:GM) designs, builds, and sells trucks, crossovers, cars, and automobile parts worldwide. On April 29, TD Cowen bumped up its target on General Motors Company […]

headline: What Caused Ford's 14% Y/Y U.S. Sales Decline in April?
summary: F's April U.S. sales slide 14% as weak EV, hybrid, truck and SUV demand, plus macro pressures, offset gains in select models like Bronco.

raw.headline: What Caused Ford's 14% Y/Y U.S. Sales Decline in April?
raw.summary: F's April U.S. sales slide 14% as weak EV, hybrid, truck and SUV demand, plus macro pressures, offset gains in select models like Bronco.

headline: LCID Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates on Inventory Write-Downs
summary: LCID posts wider-than-expected Q1 loss and misses estimates as write-downs, costs and supplier issues hit margins, even as revenues grow and liquidity gets a boost.

raw.headline: LCID Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates on Inventory Write-Downs
raw.summary: LCID posts wider-than-expected Q1 loss and misses estimates as write-downs, costs and supplier issues hit margins, even as revenues grow and liquidity gets a boost.

headline: Former Detroit Pistons Vinnie Johnson Expands Auto Business At Site Of Old NBA Stomping Ground
summary: Former Detroit Pistons guard Vinnie Johnson is bringing business to the site where he won two NBA Championships

headline: CNBC Daily Open: Kospi bull run rolls on
summary: South Korea's Kospi surges to a new peak as a rally in Samsung shares takes the chip giant's markets capitalization above $1 trillion.
